root.sql: SELECT tax_date , tax_seq , c_text , ( '401N' || '|' || trim( (row_number() over ())::text) || '|' || c_text ) as c_tax from ( select sc_fin_send_tax_company.tax_date ,sc_fin_send_tax_company.tax_seq ,( sc_fin_send_tax_company.id_card || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_company.memname || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.address_no || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.road || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.tambol || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_district_name ( province_code , district_code ) || '|' || PKA_COM_FUNCTION.fp_get_province_name( province_code ) || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.postcode || '|' || sc_fin_send_tax_company.memsurname || '|' || pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_fin_send_tax_company.tax_date ,'ddmmyyyy') || '|' || sc_fin_ucf_company.tax_rate || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_company.paid_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || trim( to_char( sc_fin_send_tax_company.tax_amount ,'9999999.99')) || '|' || '1' ) as c_text FROM sc_fin_send_tax_company ,sc_fin_ucf_company WHERE 1=1 and sc_fin_send_tax_company.company_id = sc_fin_ucf_company.company_id and sc_fin_send_tax_company.paid_amount > 0 /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_fin_send_tax_company.tax_date , sc_fin_send_tax_company.tax_seq ) tb
